title: Rebuild Media Generation Hub with mature gradient glassmorphism UI

requirements.text: Refresh the frontend visual theme to use mature, rich CSS linear gradients (deep charcoal, slate, and warm amber/emerald/gold accent tones — no blue or purple) combined with glassmorphism card surfaces (backdrop-blur, semi-transparent borders, subtle inner glow), high-contrast sharp typography, and consistent neon-glow hover effects on interactive elements across all pages (landing, generate, gallery, credits, admin).

quotes: I want to add a very matured and gradient color for the front end
Frontend: React-based UI featuring a 'Glassmorphism' design. We'll use CSS linear gradients with high-contrast typography for that 'matured' look.

acceptanceCriteria: All page backgrounds use CSS linear gradients with deep, mature tones (no blue or purple).
Cards and modals use glassmorphism styling: backdrop-blur, semi-transparent background, subtle glowing border.
Accent colors (amber, emerald, or gold) are applied consistently to buttons, badges, and interactive elements.
Typography is sharp and high-contrast against dark gradient backgrounds.
Hover and focus states on buttons and cards display a neon-glow or gradient highlight effect.
Theme is consistent across IndexPage, GeneratePage, GalleryPage, CreditsPage, and AdminPage.

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
All Motoko logic must remain in the single backend/main.mo actor — do not introduce new canister files.
Do not integrate Supabase — all storage must remain in ICP stable memory as currently implemented.
Do not add blue or purple to the color palette.
nonGoals: Adding new backend features or API endpoints beyond what already exists.
Changing authentication logic or Internet Identity integration.
Modifying Stripe payment flow or credit balance logic.
Adding real-time WebSocket or push notification features.
